'''Logirth''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

An inaugural officer of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Logirth served as the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of ''[[Venture]]''. When the shuttle ''[[Tampion]]'' was sent to the Fifth Battle Group bearing [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Logirth was charged with establishing a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] escort. To maintain tight security, Logirth chose and briefed the pilots for the mission only four hours before cockpit call. Despite his efforts, the reports of [[Belezaboth Ourn]] compromised the mission and allowed the [[Yevetha]] to capture ''Tampion''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
